# lumberyard_dirmap (Data Source)

Traverses a nested directory of YAML and JSON files and constructs a nested object, returned as a JSON string.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) The base directory to traverse.

### Optional

- `filter` (String) A glob pattern to filter files.

### Read-Only

- `result` (String) The constructed object from the directory structure, as a JSON string.
